# Cathodoluminescence

**Summary**: A technique used to distinguish mineral species and identify paragenetic sequences based on trace element differences.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-salih|Salih, 2016]] used cathodoluminescence to interpret different mineral paragenetic sequences and determine mineral abundance.
